title: Quick Guide - Translations
scenario: Quick Guide translations are incorrect or missing across supported languages in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a device set to a supported language.
3. Locate and access the Quick Guide (e.g., via the menu or settings).
4. Go through each screen/page of the Quick Guide and verify all text is translated into the selected language.
5. Note any untranslated, garbled, or incorrectly translated text.
6. Change the device system language to another supported language.
7. Repeat steps 1–5 for each supported language.
expected: All text in the Quick Guide is properly translated and displayed correctly for every supported language, with no untranslated strings, truncation, or formatting issues.
